commit_scope: Add a Form-native live receipt bridge so Android/Mac active samples, capability receipts, and model eval receipts feed world-model growth as inspectable wmg-sense rows.

local_validation.notes: Focused Form validation returned 8191 across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu. The dedicated fourth-arm check returned PASS-4WAY world-model-live-sense. Wellness reported what_wants_attention: none.

commands: Hostinger Auto Deploy on main after merge
deploy_validation.notes: No public HTTP endpoint behavior changes are expected; deploy validation remains pending until merge.

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way proof and wellness pass; CI and post-merge deploy validation are pending.

evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh ... world-model-live-sense-band.fk -> 8191; kernels agree on every sample
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh world-model-live-sense -> PASS-4WAY world-model-live-sense

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Live Android/Mac active samples, capability receipts, and model eval receipts can now be converted into wmg-sense rows, preserving observed/absent/nothing semantics and inspectable metadata before world-model growth digests and embodies them.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form-native receipt bridge; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Valid active sample, ready capability receipt, and high-quality model eval produce observed senses.
Inactive sample, capability floor without liveness, and low-quality eval produce absent senses.
Timeout sense remains nothing and is not conflated with absent.
Live sense lists fold into world-model-growth and embody only when the trusted-core world-module model follows.
